title: croixia pseudocuneata
intro: Croixia pseudocuneata, also known as the Chinese croixia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croixia pseudocuneata include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically to apply to skin irritations and wounds.
